# AGENTS.md — nestjs
<!-- Generated by memory-core on 2026-05-10 — run: memory-core sync -->

**Type:** backend | **Language:** Typescript
**Backend:** Clean Architecture


---
## Backend Rules — Clean Architecture
- Entities encapsulate core business logic and have no external dependencies
- Use cases orchestrate application workflows and call domain entities
- Controllers must only validate input and delegate to use cases
- Infrastructure layer (DB, HTTP, queues) depends on application — never the reverse
- Domain layer must not import any framework or library code
- Use DTOs to transfer data across layer boundaries
- Repository interfaces are defined in the domain/application layer, implemented in infrastructure
- Validation happens at the interface/controller layer only

### Structure
- src/domain/entities
- src/domain/repositories
- src/domain/value-objects
- src/application/use-cases
- src/application/services
- src/application/dtos
- src/infrastructure/database
- src/infrastructure/http
- src/interfaces/controllers
- src/interfaces/presenters

### Never
- Business logic in controllers or route handlers
- Direct database queries inside use cases
- Framework-specific imports in the domain layer
- Calling use cases from other use cases directly
- Fat repositories that contain business logic

## Memory from Previous Projects
- [rule · nextjs] Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.

- [rule · nextjs] Use (groupName) folders to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by concern: (marketing), (dashboard), (auth). Each group can have its own layout.
- [rule · clean-architecture] Domain entities and value objects must not import any framework, ORM, or library. Pure TypeScript/language only.
- [rule · hexagonal] The core (domain + application) must not import Express, NestJS, Prisma, or any framework. Pure domain logic only.
- [decision · nextjs] Use route groups (folder) to organize routes without affecting URLs. Group by feature or access level (auth), (public).
- [rule · clean-architecture] Use cases must not import Prisma, TypeORM, or any ORM entity. Call repository interfaces only.
- [rule · hexagonal] The application core (domain + use cases) must not import Express, NestJS, Fastify, Prisma, TypeORM, or any framework library. Pure language code only.
